latest.title: #2475 - Andrew Jarecki
latest.desc:
Andrew Jarecki is a filmmaker, musician, entrepreneur, and documentarian. His latest documentary, “The Alabama Solution,” co-directed with Charlotte Kaufman, is available to stream on HBO Max and other digital platforms.www.thealabamasolution.com

latest.title: #494 – Jensen Huang: NVIDIA – The $4 Trillion Company & the AI Revolution
latest.desc:
Jensen Huang is the co-founder and CEO of NVIDIA, the world’s most valuable company and the engine powering the AI computing revolution.

latest.title: Molly Bloom: Power, Overcoming Fear, & The Darkness of Human Nature
latest.desc: Molly Bloom is the real-life inspiration behind the Oscar-nominated film Molly’s Game. She built and ran the most exclusive high-stakes underground poker game in the world, attended by celebrities, billionaires, and powerful figures.
